[156:38]28, then I'm going to sit it out all over again. And that's what we need to be prepared

[156:42]to do. And if that means letting the Democrats win, so be it. I'm beyond caring at this point.

[156:54]have royally pissed me off. Now they need to be utterly destroyed. And you know what?

[160:58]like there ever really was an actual agreement.

[161:03]And there's something very strange going on here.

[161:07]I said it on Monday and I said it, I think on Tuesday as well.

[161:12]Before you say anything about this war in Iran, you have to make one thing absolutely clear

[161:21]Everything that is being said about this war is a lie.

[161:25]Everything being said by the administration,

[161:28]everything being reported by the press is a lie.

[161:33]And when I say a lie, I don't mean they're getting it wrong.

[161:37]I don't mean we're in the fog of war and we don't know everything.

[161:41]I don't mean they're fudging it.

[161:43]I don't mean it's politically biased.

[161:46]I mean, the national security apparatus is manufacturing a calculated deception because

[161:55]that is part of the war effort.

[161:58]The information war, the information space is another domain of the war itself.

[162:05]So just like we engage in outer space and in the air and at sea and on the ground, we

[162:14]And everything, literally everything that has been said by the White House, by the Pentagon,

[162:20]and then reported in the press by anonymous sources that are planting these stories, all

[162:25]of these things are a part of an information campaign.

[162:30]And so when you hear the president announce something, you cannot take it at face value.

[162:35]And when you see the reports in the media, you can't take it at face value.

[162:42]So last night, we get the announcement from Trump on true social and even that announcement,

[162:48]we really, it reeked of uncertainty.

[162:52]We really don't know what's going on.
